name: Opacity utilities
description: Element opacity utilities bound to the opacity token scale (0-100 in 5% steps up to 30, then coarser).

families.name: opacity
guidance: Opacity applies to the whole element, including its text and children — dimming text this way can drop it below the contrast floor. Prefer a lighter token color for text.
Do not use opacity to hide content from assistive tech; opacity-0 leaves the element focusable and in the accessibility tree.
families.a11y: opacity-0 hides visually but not from screen readers or keyboard focus; use visibility/display utilities to remove content from all users.
